message:
fix(web): pass center=false to scrollToPosition in sync effect

The scrollToPosition function defaults to center=true, but the sync
effect comment said we want center=false. This mismatch could cause
scroll position jumping when external updates came through.

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)
